chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D - 2837 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on office objections No.1 to 4 & 7. 2) For hearing of Main Case. 29.09.2025. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Masroor Ahmed holding brief for Mr. Waleed Khanzada, Advocate for KW&SC. Ms. Zahida Abdul Sattar, Advocate for Respondent No.3. ________________ Mr. Masroor Ahmed, advocate files comments on behalf of respondent No.2, which is taken on record. None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Dismissed for non- prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Nasir/
